title: ClawDeck API Compatibility Wiring
summary: Added SQLite-backed ClawDeck compatibility store for mission-control
Wired workspace/agent/task/event CRUD and openclaw status compatibility endpoints
Kept existing mission-control APIs stable with scoped compatibility behavior
Added test coverage for compatibility flow
rollback_steps: Remove ClawdeckCompatStore wiring in src/index.ts and src/missionControl/server.ts
Revert compatibility API route blocks in src/missionControl/server.ts
Remove compatibility API test in src/tests/missionControlApi.test.ts
open_items: Add compatibility endpoints for task planning/activity/deliverables
Add compatibility SSE stream endpoint for live feed parity
